name: logistics supervisors managing 5–10 vehicles tool
description: For logistics supervisors managing 5–10 vehicles, inaccurate fuel usage reporting causes overspending. We provide automated monthly fuel reports instead of manual spreadsheets and estimates.
problem_solved: Inaccurate fuel usage reporting leads to overspending.
features: manual data entry for fuel usage
